name: Nordecon AS
summary: Nordecon AS operates as a construction company in Estonia, Sweden, Finland, and Ukraine. It is involved in the general contracting and project management of buildings and infrastructure construction. The company engages in building office and industrial buildings, warehouses, non-residential buildings, and apartment buildings, as well as various storage facilities and tanks for agricultural purposes; and the design and preparation of concrete works, including complete loadbearing structure and basement solutions, concrete floors, frameworks, roofs, and ceilings. It also provides general contracting and project management services in the field of civil engineering works, including road construction and maintenance, engineering and environmental construction, rental of building equipment, and production of road construction materials, as well as rents, sells, and maintains road construction and earthworks machines. In addition, the company engages in designing and building concrete works, including bridges, overpasses, viaducts, tunnels, basements, and reinforced concrete frameworks for buildings, as well as railway base structures and erections; and building ports, berths, breakwaters, and bank protections, as well as in the construction of utility, water, and other civil engineering projects. Further, it is involved in traffic management operations; geodetic surveys; and coordination and development of the work of the construction material quarries. The company was formerly known as Nordecon International AS and changed its name to Nordecon AS in January 2011. Nordecon AS was founded in 1989 and is based in Tallinn, Estonia. Nordecon AS is a subsidiary of AS Nordic Contractors.
